```{r}
library(lgpr)
library(stringr)
library(reshape2)
library(tidyr)
library(beepr)      
library(tidyverse)
library(tictoc)
mytoc <- \() {
  toc(func.toc = \(tic, toc, msg) {
    sprintf("%s took %s sec", msg, as.character(signif(toc - tic, 2)))
  })}
library(posterior)
options(pillar.neg = FALSE,
        pillar.subtle = FALSE,
        pillar.sigfig = 2)
library(tinytable)
options(tinytable_format_num_fmt = "significant_cell",
        tinytable_format_digits = 2,
        tinytable_tt_digits = 2)
library(loo)
library(bayesplot)
theme_set(bayesplot::theme_default(base_family = "sans"))
library(ggdist)
library(patchwork)
library(ggrepel)
library(RColorBrewer)
set1 <- brewer.pal(7, "Set1")
Sys.setlocale("LC_TIME", "en_GB.utf8")

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

rstan_options(auto_write = TRUE)
options(mc.cores = parallel::detectCores())

set.seed(123)
```


```{r}
load(file = "./data/wido.RData")
# Plot the average smoothed change in original values on original scale (1 to 7)
p1<-ggplot() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) +
  labs(x = "Months from Widowhood", y = "Life Satisfaction Original") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(1, 7, by = 1), limits = c(1, 7)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-180, 180, by = 30), limits = c(-180, 180)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  theme(aspect.ratio=0.9) +
geom_smooth(data = wido, aes(x=mnths, y=lifesatisfaction)) +
  ggtitle("Average Life Satisfaction Change On Original Scale") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")) 

p2<-ggplot() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) +
  labs(x = "Months from Widowhood", y = "Life Satisfaction Original") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(1, 7, by = 1), limits = c(1, 7)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-180, 180, by = 30), limits = c(-180, 180)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  theme(aspect.ratio=0.9) +
geom_line(data = wido, aes(x=mnths, y=lifesatisfaction, group = id, color = factor(id)), alpha= 0.2) +
  ggtitle("Average Life Satisfaction Change On Original Scale") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")) +
  geom_line(data = wido, aes(x = mnths, y = m_lifesat_per_mnth), color = "red")

p1
p2

ggsave("trajectories.png", p2, width = 10, height = 6,dpi = 180)
ggsave("smooth.png", p1, width = 10, height = 6,dpi = 180)
```

```{r}
counts <- wido %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  summarise(
        n   = n(),
        sd = sd(lifesatisfaction),
        min = min(mnths),
        max = max(mnths),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

idx_1 <- counts  %>%
  filter(n >= 15)# %>% filter(min < -50) %>% filter(max > 50) #%>% 
  #arrange(desc(sd)) )[1:20,]

  idx <- sample(idx_1$id, 20, replace=FALSE)
  
data_shorter <-wido %>%
  filter(id %in% idx) %>% filter(id != 851968)
nrow(data_shorter)

mnth <- data_shorter %>%
  group_by(mnths) %>%
  summarise(
    sat_mean = mean(lifesatisfaction),
        n_beeps   = n(),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )


p2<-ggplot() +
  labs(x = "Months from Widowhood", y = "Life Satisfaction Original") +
  geom_line(data = data_shorter, aes(x=mnths, y=lifesatisfaction, group = id, color = factor(id)), alpha= 0.2) +
  ggtitle("Average Life Satisfaction Change On Original Scale") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")) + 
  geom_point(data = data_shorter, aes(x=mnths, y=lifesatisfaction, group = id, color = factor(id)), alpha= 0.2)+
  #geom_line(data = mnth, aes(x = mnths, y = sat_mean), color = "red")+
  geom_smooth(data = data_shorter, aes(x = mnths, y=lifesatisfaction))

p2

save(data_shorter, file = "data_shorter.RData")
load(file = "./data/data_shorter.RData")
```



```{r}
num_draws <- 300
mu_wrp <- -0.7
sigma_wrp <- 0.3
r <- range(wido$mnths, na.rm = TRUE)

# Define prior for lgp()
my_prior <- list(wrp = log_normal(mu_wrp, sigma_wrp))

# Prior draws
wrp_draws <- stats::rlnorm(num_draws, mu_wrp, sigma_wrp)

# Plot corresponding input warping functions
# - this function is not exported from lgpr so we need to use triple colons :::
# - alpha here is line opacity, not a GP parameter
lgpr:::plot_inputwarp(wrp_draws, seq(r[1], r[2], by = 1), alpha = 0.1)

```

```{r}
# Fit model
gp_0 <- lgp(lifesatisfaction ~ gp_ns(mnths) + zs(id), data = data_shorter, sample_f = TRUE)

print(gp_0)
save(gp_0, file="gp_0.RData")
```

```{r}
# Create function to wrangle the predictions to the correct format
process_predictions <- function(predicted) {
  # Extract and reshape predictions 
  x <- as.data.frame(predicted@x)
  y <- as.data.frame(predicted@h) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = everything()) %>%
    dplyr::select(-name) %>%
    rename(y = value)

  # Combine 
  data <- cbind(x, y)
  
  return(data)
}

set.seed(123)

# Filter the data to include only the randomly selected participants
gp_pred_r_rsample <- data_shorter

# Define time sequence
t <- seq(-178, 179, by = 1)

# Generate prediction dataset
x_pred <- new_x(data_shorter, t, group_by = NA, x = "mnths")

# Apply function for predictions for shared effect (f = fixed effect) and person-specific effect (r = random effects)
p_1<-pred(gp_0, x_pred, reduce = mean, verbose = FALSE)
gp_pred_f <- process_predictions(p_1)
gp_pred_r <- process_predictions(pred(gp_0, reduce = mean, verbose = FALSE))


draws_summary <- function(mat, grid) {
  df <- tibble(
    mnths = grid,
    mean   = colMeans(mat),
    lo     = apply(mat, 2, quantile, 0.025),
    hi     = apply(mat, 2, quantile, 0.975)
  )
  
  df
}


n_draws <- nrow(get_draws(gp_0))
idx     <- sample(n_draws, min(200, n_draws))

pred_ci    <- pred(gp_0, x_pred, draws = idx, verbose = FALSE)
df_ci    <- draws_summary(pred_ci@h, t)


p_0 <- ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(data = df_ci,
              aes(x = mnths, ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
              alpha = 0.18) +
  
  geom_line(
    data = gp_pred_r_rsample,
    aes(mnths, y = lifesatisfaction, group = id),
    color = "grey70",
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = gp_pred_f,
    aes(x = mnths, y = y),
    color = "firebrick4",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  ggtitle("Gaussian Process Regression") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"))
p_0

ggsave("gp_0.png",
       p_0,
       width = 10,
       height = 6,
       dpi = 180)
```


```{r}
comp_0<-plot_components(gp_0,
  group_by = NA,
  t_name  = "mnths",
  ncol = 2
)
```


```{r}
prior <- list(
  alpha = log_normal(0, 1), 
  ell = log_normal(0, 1),
  wrp = log_normal(-0.7, 0.9)
)

# For reproducibility
set.seed(123)

# Fit model
gp_1 <- lgp(lifesatisfaction ~ gp_ns(mnths) + gp_ns(mnths) * zs(id), data = data_shorter, prior = prior, sample_f = TRUE)

print(gp_1)
save(gp_1, file="gp_1.RData")

load(file="gp_1.RData")
plot_components(gp_1,
  group_by = NA,
  t_name  = "mnths",
  ncol = 2
)
```

```{r}
p_1<-pred(gp_1, x_pred, reduce = mean, verbose = FALSE)
gp_pred_f <- process_predictions(p_1)
gp_pred_r <- process_predictions(pred(gp_1, reduce = mean, verbose = FALSE))

n_draws <- nrow(get_draws(gp_1))
idx     <- sample(n_draws, min(200, n_draws))

pred_ci    <- pred(gp_1, x_pred, draws = idx, verbose = FALSE)
df_ci    <- draws_summary(pred_ci@h, t)


pl_1 <- ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(data = df_ci,
              aes(x = mnths, ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
              alpha = 0.18) +
  
  geom_line(
    data = gp_pred_r_rsample,
    aes(mnths, y = lifesatisfaction, group = id),
    color = "grey70",
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = gp_pred_f,
    aes(x = mnths, y = y),
    color = "firebrick4",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  ggtitle("Gaussian Process Regression") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"))
pl_1

ggsave("gp_1.png",
       pl_1,
       width = 10,
       height = 6,
       dpi = 180)
```


```{r}
gp_2 <- lgp(lifesatisfaction ~ gp_ns(mnths) + zs(id), data = data_shorter, prior = prior, sample_f = TRUE)
print(gp_2)
save(gp_2, file="gp_2.RData")


load(file="gp_2.RData")
plot_components(gp_2,
  group_by = NA,
  t_name  = "mnths",
  ncol = 2
)
```
```{r}
p_2<-pred(gp_2, x_pred, reduce = mean, verbose = FALSE)
gp_pred_f <- process_predictions(p_2)
gp_pred_r <- process_predictions(pred(gp_2, reduce = mean, verbose = FALSE))

n_draws <- nrow(get_draws(gp_2))
idx     <- sample(n_draws, min(200, n_draws))

pred_ci    <- pred(gp_2, x_pred, draws = idx, verbose = FALSE)
df_ci    <- draws_summary(pred_ci@h, t)


pl_2 <- ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(data = df_ci,
              aes(x = mnths, ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
              alpha = 0.18) +
  
  geom_line(
    data = gp_pred_r_rsample,
    aes(mnths, y = lifesatisfaction, group = id),
    color = "grey70",
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = gp_pred_f,
    aes(x = mnths, y = y),
    color = "firebrick4",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  ggtitle("Gaussian Process Regression") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"))
pl_2

ggsave("gp_2.png",
       pl_2,
       width = 10,
       height = 6,
       dpi = 180)
```


# -------------------------------------------------------------------LESS DATA

```{r}
set.seed(124)
idx <- sample(unique(data_shorter$id), 10, replace=FALSE)
  
data_even_shorter <-data_shorter %>%
  filter(id %in% idx) 
nrow(data_even_shorter)

mnth <- data_even_shorter %>%
  group_by(mnths) %>%
  summarise(
    sat_mean = mean(lifesatisfaction),
        n_beeps   = n(),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )


p2<-ggplot() +
  labs(x = "Months from Widowhood", y = "Life Satisfaction Original") +
  geom_line(data = data_even_shorter, aes(x=mnths, y=lifesatisfaction, group = id, color = factor(id)), alpha= 0.2) +
  ggtitle("Average Life Satisfaction Change On Original Scale") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")) + 
  geom_point(data = data_even_shorter, aes(x=mnths, y=lifesatisfaction, group = id, color = factor(id)), alpha= 0.2)+
  #geom_line(data = mnth, aes(x = mnths, y = sat_mean), color = "red")+
  geom_smooth(data = data_even_shorter, aes(x = mnths, y=lifesatisfaction))

p2

save(data_even_shorter, file = "data_even_shorter.RData")
load(file = "./data/data_even_shorter.RData")

ggsave("data_even_shorter.png",
       p2,
       width = 10,
       height = 6,
       dpi = 180)
```

# less data + good model + informative prior
```{r}

prior <- list(
  alpha = student_t(1, square = TRUE), #log_normal(0, 1), 
  ell = igam(1, 4), #log_normal(0, 1),
  wrp = log_normal(-0.5, 1) 
)


gp_3 <- lgp(lifesatisfaction ~ gp_ns(mnths) + zs(id), data = data_even_shorter, prior = prior ,sample_f = TRUE)
print(gp_3)
save(gp_3, file="gp_3.RData")


#load(file="gp_3.RData")
plot_components(gp_3,
  group_by = NA,
  t_name  = "mnths",
  ncol = 2
)

p_3<-pred(gp_3, x_pred, reduce = mean, verbose = FALSE)
gp_pred_f <- process_predictions(p_3)
gp_pred_r <- process_predictions(pred(gp_3, reduce = mean, verbose = FALSE))

n_draws <- nrow(get_draws(gp_3))
idx     <- sample(n_draws, min(200, n_draws))

pred_ci    <- pred(gp_3, x_pred, draws = idx, verbose = FALSE)
df_ci    <- draws_summary(pred_ci@h, t)


pl_3 <- ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(data = df_ci,
              aes(x = mnths, ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
              alpha = 0.18) +
  
  geom_line(
    data = data_even_shorter,
    aes(mnths, y = lifesatisfaction, group = id),
    color = "grey70",
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = gp_pred_f,
    aes(x = mnths, y = y),
    color = "firebrick4",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  ggtitle("Gaussian Process Regression") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"))
pl_3

ggsave("gp_3.png",
       pl_3,
       width = 10,
       height = 6,
       dpi = 180)
```
# less data + good model but with default priors
```{r}

gp_4 <- lgp(lifesatisfaction ~ gp_ns(mnths) + zs(id), data = data_even_shorter ,sample_f = TRUE)
print(gp_4)
save(gp_4, file="gp_4.RData")


#load(file="gp_4.RData")
plot_components(gp_4,
  group_by = NA,
  t_name  = "mnths",
  ncol = 2
)

p_4<-pred(gp_4, x_pred, reduce = mean, verbose = FALSE)
gp_pred_f <- process_predictions(p_4)
gp_pred_r <- process_predictions(pred(gp_4, reduce = mean, verbose = FALSE))

n_draws <- nrow(get_draws(gp_4))
idx     <- sample(n_draws, min(200, n_draws))

pred_ci    <- pred(gp_4, x_pred, draws = idx, verbose = FALSE)
df_ci    <- draws_summary(pred_ci@h, t)


pl_4 <- ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(data = df_ci,
              aes(x = mnths, ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
              alpha = 0.18) +
  
  geom_line(
    data = data_even_shorter,
    aes(mnths, y = lifesatisfaction, group = id),
    color = "grey70",
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = gp_pred_f,
    aes(x = mnths, y = y),
    color = "firebrick4",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  ggtitle("Gaussian Process Regression") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"))
pl_4

ggsave("gp_4.png",
       pl_4,
       width = 10,
       height = 6,
       dpi = 180)
```

### STAN changepoint kernel

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(rstan)
library(ggplot2)
rstan_options(auto_write = TRUE)
options(mc.cores = parallel::detectCores())

data_even_shorter <- data_even_shorter %>%
  select(id, lifesatisfaction, mnths) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lifesatisfaction), !is.na(mnths)) %>%
  arrange(id, mnths) %>%
  mutate(id_int = as.integer(factor(id)))

stan_data <- list(
  N = nrow(data_even_shorter),
  S = length(unique(data_even_shorter$id_int)),
  y = data_even_shorter$lifesatisfaction,
  x = data_even_shorter$mnths,
  subj = data_even_shorter$id_int
)

fit <- stan(
  file = "C:/Users/margo/stan/HIER.stan",# gp_changepoint
  data = stan_data,
  chains = 4,
  iter = 500,
  warmup = 200,
  seed = 123,
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.9)
)

beep()

print(
  fit,
  pars = c("length_scale_k_1","variance_k_1", #"length_scale_k_2","variance_k_2","length_scale_k_3","variance_k_3",
           "sigma","sigma_alpha")#, "steepness")
)

save(
  fit,
  file = "fit_0.RData"
)

#load("fit_0.RData")


post_fit <- rstan::extract(fit)
fit_n <- apply(post_fit$fit, 2, mean) # gp_mean
intercept_n <- colMeans(post_fit$alpha) #alpha_hat
#steepness <- mean(post_fit$steepness)

data_even_shorter <- data_even_shorter %>%
  mutate(
    gp_mean = fit_n,
    alpha_hat = intercept_n[id_int],
    
    gp_centered = gp_mean - alpha_hat,
    resid = lifesatisfaction - gp_mean
  )

ggplot()+
  
 geom_line(
 data = data_even_shorter,
  aes(x = mnths, y = gp_mean, group = id), alpha = 0.12, color = "black") +
  
  
   geom_line(
 data = data_even_shorter,
  aes(x = mnths, y = lifesatisfaction, group = id), alpha = 0.12, color = "blue") +
  
     geom_line(
 data = data_even_shorter,
  aes(x = mnths, y = fit_n), alpha = 0.12, color = "red")# +
  # geom_point(
  #   aes(group = 1),
  #   se = FALSE,
  #   color = "blue",
  #   linewidth = 1.5
  # ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Trajectory density",
    subtitle = "Blue =  GP mean",
    x = "Months",
    y = "Centered GP trajectory"
  )



ggplot() +
  geom_line(
    data = data_even_shorter,
    aes(mnths, y = lifesatisfaction, group = id),
    color = "grey70",
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = data_even_shorter,
    aes(x = mnths, y = gp_mean),
    color = "firebrick4",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  ggtitle("Gaussian Process Regression") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"))
```






```{r}
# old plots
qtls_fit<-posterior_interval(post_fit$fit)
qtls_pred<-posterior_interval(post_fit$y_2)
qtls_eff_1<-posterior_interval(post_fit$eff_1)
qtls_eff_2<-posterior_interval(post_fit$eff_2)
qtls_eff_3<-posterior_interval(post_fit$eff_3)
qtls_eff_4<-posterior_interval(post_fit$eff_4)

pred <- data.frame(da_x = append(daily_d_shorter$day, seq(239, 300, by = 1)), 
                   da_y = append(daily_d_shorter$irr_mean, rep(0, 62)), 
                   gp = append(fit_n, y2_n), 
                   ci_05 = append(qtls_fit[, 1],qtls_pred[, 1]),
                   ci_95 = append(qtls_fit[, 2],qtls_pred[, 2]),
                   e_1 = eff_1, 
                   e_2 = eff_2, 
                   e_3 = eff_3, 
                   e_4 = eff_4)

fit_plot <- ggplot() + geom_point(aes(x = data_even_shorter$day, y = daily_d_shorter$irr_mean)) + geom_line(data = pred,aes(da_x, gp), color = "red") + geom_ribbon(data = pred, aes(x = da_x, ymin = ci_05, ymax = ci_95), fill = "gray60", alpha = 0.4)
eff_1_plot <-ggplot() + geom_point(aes(x = daily_d_shorter$day, y = daily_d_shorter$irr_mean))  + geom_line(data = pred,aes(da_x, e_1), color = "red") + geom_ribbon(data = pred, aes(x = da_x, ymin = qtls_eff_1[,1], ymax = qtls_eff_1[,2]), fill = "gray60", alpha = 0.4)
eff_2_plot <- ggplot() + geom_point(aes(x = daily_d_shorter$day, y = daily_d_shorter$irr_mean))  + geom_line(data = pred,aes(da_x, e_2), color = "red") + geom_ribbon(data = pred, aes(x = da_x, ymin = qtls_eff_2[,1], ymax = qtls_eff_2[,2]), fill = "gray60", alpha = 0.4)
eff_3_plot <- ggplot() + geom_point(aes(x = daily_d_shorter$day, y = daily_d_shorter$irr_mean))  + geom_line(data = pred,aes(da_x, e_3), color = "red") + geom_ribbon(data = pred, aes(x = da_x, ymin = qtls_eff_3[,1], ymax = qtls_eff_3[,2]), fill = "gray60", alpha = 0.4)
eff_4_plot <- ggplot() + geom_point(aes(x = daily_d_shorter$day, y = daily_d_shorter$irr_mean))  + geom_line(data = pred,aes(da_x, e_4), color = "red") + geom_ribbon(data = pred, aes(x = da_x, ymin = qtls_eff_4[,1], ymax = qtls_eff_4[,2]), fill = "gray60", alpha = 0.4)
p<-(fit_plot ) / (eff_4_plot + eff_1_plot) / (eff_2_plot + eff_3_plot)
p
ggsave("gp_changepoint.png", p, width = 15, height = 15,dpi = 180)
```
